title: select returns incorrect values ​​when using both operator <=> and operator and
description:
select returns incorrect values ​​when using both operator <=> and operator and
How to repeat:
create table tb(date_col date);
insert into tb values('1998-11-03'),('1980-11-03'),('2008-08-08'),('2023-06-13');
SELECT date_col FROM tb GROUP BY 1 HAVING date_col <=> CAST('1998-02-03' AS YEAR) ORDER BY 1;
SELECT date_col FROM tb GROUP BY 1 HAVING date_col <=> CAST('1998-02-03' AS YEAR) and date_col <=> '1998-11-03' ORDER BY 1;

expected result:
The second select sql execution result is empty.

actual results:
The second select sql execution result is not empty.
+------------+
|  date_col  | 
+------------+
| 1998-11-03 |
+------------+
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tb2(id INT PRIMARY KEY, date_col DATE, value_col INT);
SELECT date_col FROM tb2 WHERE value_col IS NULL OR date_col = '1998-11-03' ORDER BY date_col;
SELECT date_col FROM tb2 WHERE date_col = '1998-02-03' AND value_col > 15 ORDER BY date_col;
SELECT date_col FROM tb2 GROUP BY date_col HAVING date_col = '1998-11-03' AND date_col = '2000-01-01' ORDER BY date_col;
key_bug_features: using <=> and and operators in SQL query
